# Checkbox

Toggles a binary option in a form or settings surface.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/checkbox
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="checkbox" example={0} code={`<Checkbox aria-label="Accept terms" />`} />

```tsx
<Checkbox aria-label="Accept terms" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="checkbox"
  example={1}
  code={`<Checkbox defaultChecked aria-label="Subscribed" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Checkbox defaultChecked aria-label="Subscribed" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="checkbox"
  example={2}
  code={`<Checkbox checked="indeterminate" aria-label="Bulk select" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Checkbox checked="indeterminate" aria-label="Bulk select" />
```

## Props

| Prop      | Type           | Required | Default | Description |
| --------- | -------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `invalid` | `boolean`      | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`    | `CheckboxSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant | Values           |
| ------- | ---------------- |
| `size`  | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/checkbox.json`
- Recipe: `checkbox`
- Files: `src/components/ui/checkbox.tsx`
